output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?winner WHERE {
  wd:Q12345 wdt:P1545 ?winner .
  ?winner wdt:P4109 ?color .
  FILTER(YEAR(?color) < 2000)
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?color) , "white") && CONTAINS(STR(?color) , "blue"))
}
output.answer: No results found. The entity "Ebony Shoe club" does not exist in Wikidata, and the search attempts failed due to unavailable indexes. The query assumes a fictional entity (wd:Q12345), but no such entity exists in the knowledge graph.

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

  wd:Q12345 wdt:P1545 ?winner .
  ?winner wdt:P4109 ?color .
  FILTER(YEAR(?color) < 2000)
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?color) , "white") && CONTAINS(STR(?color) , "blue"))
}
